gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/137)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/137)
text: كَانَ يَقُولُ مَا أَكَلْتُ طَعَاماً أَبْقَى وَ لَا أَهْيَجَ لِلدَّاءِ مِنَ اللَّحْمِ الْيَابِسِ يَعْنِي الْقَدِيدَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Musa Bin Al Hassan, from Muhammad Bin Isa,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> the 3rd, said, ‘He<sup>asws</sup> used to say: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> have not eaten a foodstuff which is more remaining nor more stirring for the illnesses than the dried meat, meaning the Jerk’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Musa ibn al-Hassan from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, al-Thalith, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would say, ‘I have not used anything for food more inducing illnesses than dried up meat, that is, al-Qadid.’”
